channel.title: Composer on Today I Learned | KitHub
channel.description: Recent content in Composer on Today I Learned | KitHub

item.title: [Engineering] Why a Data Engineer Should Understand Memory
item.description: 🧠 謎の挙動に強くなる。BigQuery Resources exceeded / pandas OOM / Composer worker のメモリで詰まらないために。

item.title: [Engineering] Why a Data Engineer Should Understand TCP/IP
item.description: 📡 通信エラーに強くなる。BigQuery / GCS / Composer で必ず遭う「タイムアウト・切断」を読み解くための TCP/IP 入門。
